input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.3.2
            TITLE: driving a vehicle outside of scheduled events or scheduled practice will result in a 200 point

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.3.2: Driving a vehicle outside of scheduled events or scheduled practice will result in a 200 point
D.3.3.2 Driving a vehicle outside of scheduled events or scheduled practice will result in a 200 point 
penalty for the first violation and disqualification for a second violation.

final_answer: D.3.3.2 Driving a vehicle outside of scheduled events or scheduled practice will result in a 200 point penalty for the first violation and disqualification for a second violation.
